name: io.github.Perseus-Computing-LLC/mimir
title: Mimir — Persistent Memory Engine for AI Agents
description: Lightweight Rust MCP server providing persistent memory for AI agents. SQLite + FTS5 keyword search, Ebbinghaus decay, knowledge graph with entity linking, journal audit trails, state management with TTL, vault import/export, and conflict detection. Zero network calls, no API keys, no embeddings model required. 30 tools over stdio JSON-RPC 2.0. Runs alongside your workspace — your agent remembers across sessions.
